leadText: Clear Amulet (Japanese: クリアチャーム Clear Charm) is a type of item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Clear Amulet prevents the holder from having its stats lowered by other Pokémon's moves or Abilities . However, this item doesn't protect the user from the effects of Haze or Clear Smog . When held by a holder who has the Ability Magic Bounce , being hit by Parting Shot will still force the holder to switch out.

sections.title: Acquisition
sections.text: Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Finite methods Repeatable methods S V West Province (Area One) (from a Pokémon League representative after defeating 9 Trainers in the area) Delibird Presents ( Mesagoza Branch, after earning 4 Gym Badges ) Distribution [ edit | edit source ] Games Event Language/Region Distribution period S V Summer training support sets Japan July 22 to September 30, 2023

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An item to be held by a Pokémon. This clear, sparkling amulet protects the holder from having its stats lowered by moves used against it or by other Pokémon's Abilities.
